description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:3-jdk-10 Docker image. Define a single job named build that runs in the default test stage and executes the exact command mvn install -B. Configure the build job to archive artifacts from /builds/Slyso/AdventureGame/target/*.jar and the /builds/Slyso/AdventureGame/target/resources directory after the script finishes. No additional services, caches, variables, or rules are required.
